coverageValue: Global athletics meet discovery, including World Athletics, Area, and National Member Federation permit competitions.
cadence: daily during outdoor/indoor season; weekly otherwise
firstSpike: Build a dry-run verifier that records upcoming competition count, first event window, location fields, and whether stable competition IDs are present.

coverageValue: Athletics meet management, entries, live/result publishing, and data model alignment for track, field, road, cross-country, mountain, and trail events.
notExpectedToSolve: all global meets without organizer adoption
firstSpike: Contact OpenTrack for developer/API terms and ask whether public results endpoints may be normalized into Silbo schedules.

coverageValue: NCAA/college track and cross-country meet calendars, athlete profiles, rosters, and results.
firstSpike: Dry-run only: verify page stability and ask DirectAthletics/TFRRS about API or redistribution terms before production ingestion.

coverageValue: Snooker events, players, matches, rankings, calendars, and upcoming/current match data.
cadence: daily; more often during tournament weeks if approved
firstSpike: Request an approved X-Requested-By value and commercial-use clarification, then build a 5-call verifier.

coverageValue: Freely available structured cricket match files and person identifier register for international and major T20 competitions.
cadence: weekly/monthly batch, not live schedule cron
firstSpike: Hydrate identity and historical match metadata only; pair with TheSportsDB/API-Sports/official calendars for future fixtures.

coverageValue: Public-domain football fixtures/results datasets, including World Cup JSON and many club leagues.
firstSpike: Keep as fallback/source comparison only for events that are not already covered by TheSportsDB/API-Sports.

coverageValue: Rugby fixtures and results across competitions if coverage proves current.
firstSpike: Run a sample against Six Nations/Premiership windows and compare counts to TheSportsDB and RugbyFixture dry-run feeds.

coverageValue: Open-source packages for major North American and college sports data, useful as a cross-check and analytics enrichment lane.
firstSpike: Evaluate only packages matching sports already on Silbo and keep output in provider_event_sources until rights/source clarity is documented.

coverageValue: Potential event, fighter, category, and fight coverage using the existing APISPORTS_KEY.
cadence: daily if fight-card depth is adequate
firstSpike: Use a capped verifier to check upcoming UFC/card depth before buying SportsDataIO or Sportradar.

coverageValue: Broad schedule, team/player, artwork, TV listing, and event metadata coverage across many Silbo sports.
firstSpike: Continue using as baseline and compare all bridge candidates against existing canonical rows.
